parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT om.user_id, om.page_url, om.page_type, om.page_title, om.snapshot_hash AS prev_hash FROM positioning.own_messaging om INNER JOIN ( SELECT user_id, page_url, MAX(captured_at) AS max_captured FROM positioning.own_messaging GROUP BY user_id, page_url ) latest ON om.user_id = latest.user_id AND om.page_url = latest.page_url AND om.captured_at = latest.max_captured ORDER BY om.user_id, om.page_url;

INSERT INTO positioning.own_messaging (user_id, page_url, page_type, page_title, snapshot_text, snapshot_hash, captured_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.page_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.page_type }}', {{ $json.page_title ? "'" + $json.page_title.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.snapshot_text.replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 10000) }}', '{{ $json.snapshot_hash }}', now()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, page_url, snapshot_hash) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO positioning.drift_events (user_id, page_url, page_type, change_description, severity, drift_direction, detected_at, evidence_urls) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.page_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.page_type }}', 'Content change detected on {{ $json.page_type }} page (hash: {{ $json.prev_hash.substring(0, 8) }} → {{ $json.snapshot_hash.substring(0, 8) }})', '{{ $json.severity }}', '{{ $json.drift_direction }}', now(), ARRAY['{{ $json.page_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}']);
